title: Argus → Content-Agent Handoff
description: Schema for content idea packages Argus writes to the content inbox. Each item is a ready-to-draft idea with signal source, content framing, and platform target. A downstream content agent (or your own queue) ingests these.

handoff_version.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

scan_date.description: Date of the Argus scan that generated these ideas. YYYY-MM-DD.

items.description: Content ideas to add to the queue. Max 3 per handoff. Only include items with score >= 3 AND a clear, specific angle.

id.description: Unique ID for this handoff item. Format: argus-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

signal.description: The raw signal that triggered this idea.

headline.example: Vendor X drops API pricing by 40%

source_platform.description: Platform where the signal was found.

source_account.description: Account handle if from a social platform. Optional.

lane.description: Which interest lane this signal belongs to. Must match the lane ids in interests.yaml.

score.description: Argus relevance score. Only handoff items scored 3 or above.

content.description: The content idea to draft. This is the framing work Argus does so the writer does not have to re-derive it.

topic.description: Plain-language description of what to write about.
topic.example: What the price cut means for solo operators using this tool

angle.description: Specific take or hook direction. The most important field — the insight, not just the topic. Must be specific enough to open with.
angle.example: A cheaper tool does not mean a better workflow. The price changed; the setup did not.

vault_search.description: Keywords to find relevant Argus synthesis files in the vault.

urgency.description: How time-sensitive. 'breaking' = draft today. 'this_week' = within 3 days. 'evergreen' = no time pressure.

signal.headline: Vendor X drops API pricing by 40%

content.topic: What the price cut means for solo operators using this tool
content.angle: A cheaper tool does not mean a better workflow. The price changed; your setup did not. That is the gap.
